fields.label: activation_email
fields.subject: Request for account at {{site.name}}
fields.text:
Someone, hopefully you, requested a new account at {{site.name}}
using this email address. If it was you, welcome to {{site.name}}.
Click the link below or copy and paste it into your web browser's address bar:
 
{{url}}

If you didn't request this, you don't need to do anything; you won't 
receive any more email from us, and the request will expire automatically.

The {{site.name}} team

fields.label: dataset_to_owner_existing_user_given_access
fields.subject: A user has been given access to dataset {{dataset}} for {{site.name}}

fields.label: dataset_to_owner_new_user_given_access
fields.subject: A new user has been given access to dataset {{dataset}} for {{site.name}}

fields.label: dataset_to_owner_user_requested_access
fields.subject: Request for access to private dataset {{dataset}} for {{site.name}}

fields.label: dataset_to_user_existing_user_given_access
fields.subject: Access granted to dataset {{dataset}} at {{site.name}}
fields.text:
You have been granted access to dataset {{dataset}} at {{site.name}}.

For more information on the type of information Global Signbank stores about signs, see the manual on this page: https://signbank.cls.ru.nl/about/manual/
Note that handshapes are described in terms of phonological features separately from signs; see this page: https://signbank.cls.ru.nl/signs/search_handshape/

The Release Notes page describes the latest changes and additions to the functionalities of the website: https://signbank.cls.ru.nl/about/release/

{{site.name}} Webmaster

fields.label: feedback_general_email
fields.subject: New general feedback submitted at {{site.name}}
fields.text:
{{user.first_name}} {{user.last_name}} (user {{user.username}}, email address {{user.email}})
has submitted general feedback at {{site.name}}.

Comment:
{{comment}}

Please review it at https://{{site.domain}}/feedback/overview/

{{site.name}} Webmaster
